name: brave-search
tagline: ClawHub (189★): Web search and content extraction via Brave Search API. Use for searching documentation, facts, or any web content. Lightwe
verdict: If npm ci fails, the API key is missing, or a search/fetch call errors out, the skill gives zero guidance on what to do next — a silent dead end. It also never states what it's NOT for despite being a broad, general web-search tool that easily overlaps others. No version tracking either.

highlights.summary: Multi-step external-dependency flow (npm ci, missing API key, network search/fetch calls) has zero guidance anywhere on what to do if any of these fail.
No "NOT for" / exclusion / pointer-to-better-suited-skill text anywhere in description or body, and the skill is broad enough (general web search/content extraction) to plausibly m
No version field, changelog section, or dated revision notes anywhere in frontmatter or body.
